content: TASK-056 opened: rendering performance is a real risk. Initial ad-hoc benchmark shows parse is cheap, while layout/render dominate; large sample hit layout >1s, overview render >2s, stack+zone >8s. Added npm run bench:render via tools/bench-render.mjs for repeatable baseline. Next: profile routeEdges/buildEdgePaths/label placement and reduce unnecessary layout recomputation on overlay/view changes.
